highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.116.0 is the first stable v3 release, built on Skia m116 with multi-thread SIMD WebAssembly support.
highlights_body: This release graduates the v3 preview series to stable, adding WebAssembly multi-thread/SIMD builds, Span<SKPoint> overloads for SKMatrix and SKPath, and the final Skia m116 update. All breaking changes from the v3 preview series apply — check the change list before upgrading from v2.

breaking.title: All v2 obsolete API members removed
breaking.body: Every member marked [Obsolete] in SkiaSharp 2.x has been removed. Migrate to the v3 replacements before upgrading — the compilation errors will guide you to the new APIs.

breaking.title: SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions uses 2.88.8 behaviour
breaking.body: The encoding output for SKBitmap.Encode when called with SKPngEncoderOptions matches the 2.88.8 behaviour. Code that depended on the interim v3 preview behaviour should verify output.

bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine is at milestone m116, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and the latest Skia features.

bullets.lead: Span<SKPoint> overloads for SKMatrix and SKPath
bullets.detail: SKMatrix.MapPoints, MapVectors, and SKPath.AddPoly now have Span<SKPoint> overloads for allocation-free batch transforms.

bullets.lead: SKBlender, Skottie animation builder, and new picture APIs
bullets.detail: SKBlender exposes custom blend modes; the Skottie animation builder enables Lottie playback; SKPicture gains additional APIs.

bullets.lead: SKImage.ToRawShader, color filter spans, and GetPixelSpan offsets
bullets.detail: New convenience APIs include ToRawShader on SKImage, Span overloads on color filter factories, and offset parameters on GetPixelSpan.
Compatibility overloads for the removed SKFilterQuality enum are provided to ease migration.
Metal-specific APIs for GRBackendRenderTarget are now available on a single .NET TFM, simplifying cross-platform Metal code.
An overload of BeginRecording that uses an R-Tree spatial index is now available for improved rendering performance on complex scenes.

bullets.lead: AccessViolationException when disposing cloned SKPaint fixed
bullets.detail: Disposing a cloned SKPaint was causing an access violation due to incorrect native ownership tracking; this is now corrected.

bullets.lead: Memory leaks in MAUI views fixed
bullets.detail: Several native handle leaks in MAUI's SKCanvasView and SKGLView have been resolved.

bullets.lead: Metal Snapshot returning magenta on Apple platforms fixed
bullets.detail: SKSurface.Snapshot was returning a magenta image when using the Metal backend; colour space handling is now correct.
The native call signature for GetKerningPairAdjustments was wrong, causing incorrect kerning values; this is now fixed.

bullets.lead: Uno and WASM canvas rendering fixes
bullets.detail: Uno Skia canvas context activation, WASM canvas null-safety, and correct Bgra8888 format for SKXamlCanvas on Uno are all addressed.
SKXamlCanvas no longer throws a NullReferenceException when XamlRoot is null during unload.

bullets.lead: LibraryImport and function pointers for faster P/Invoke
bullets.detail: The native interop layer uses LibraryImport source generators and function pointers, reducing managed-to-native call overhead and improving AoT compatibility.

bullets.lead: Multi-thread and SIMD WebAssembly builds added
bullets.detail: WebAssembly targets now support multi-threaded and SIMD execution modes, enabling significant performance gains in browser and WASM environments.

bullets.lead: WinUI, WPF GL, Blazor DPI, and WinForms GLControl added
bullets.detail: Hardware-accelerated views for WinUI 3 and WPF, DPI-aware Blazor components, and updated WinForms GLControl packages are all included.

bullets.lead: Metal backend on Mac Catalyst and Apple platform improvements
bullets.detail: Mac Catalyst uses the Metal backend by default; Metal APIs are unified across .NET TFMs; Metal Snapshot colour fix is included.

bullets.lead: nosimd WASM builds restored for security-sensitive environments
bullets.detail: Non-SIMD WebAssembly builds are restored for environments requiring edge-enhanced security or Safari compatibility.
HarfBuzz updated to 8.3.0, WebP to 1.3.2, libjpeg-turbo to 2.1.5.1, .NET updated to 8.0.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: Uno platform rendering fixes including canvas context activation, XamlRoot null handling, and WASM stability
contributor_summaries.maxkatz6: PlatformConfiguration trimming, async void removal from SKXamlCanvas, and HarfBuzz function-pointer P/Invoke
contributor_summaries.Youssef1313: SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, Span overloads for SetRectRadii, and Bgra8888 fix for Uno Skia
contributor_summaries.alexandrvslv: Added Span<SKPoint> overloads to SKMatrix and SKPath
contributor_summaries.beto-rodriguez: Blazor DPI support for canvas components
contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Fixed the AccessViolationException when disposing a cloned SKPaint
contributor_summaries.lindexi: Avoided async void in SKXamlCanvas event handlers
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Reverted SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions to the 2.88.8 behaviour
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed SKXamlCanvas when XamlRoot is null during unload

preview_summaries.v3.116.0-preview.6.1: Preview 6 added multi-thread/SIMD WebAssembly support, Span<SKPoint> overloads for SKMatrix and SKPath, and the final Skia m116 update.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.5.4: Preview 5 of 3.0.0 stabilized the release with LibraryImport/function pointers, SKFilterQuality compat overloads, .NET 8 update, and ANGLE support.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.4.1: Preview 4 of 3.0.0 fixed the SKPaint dispose AVE, MAUI memory leaks, Uno/WASM canvas bugs, and added SKBlender and expanded SKPicture APIs.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.3.1: Preview 3 of 3.0.0 added the Metal Mac Catalyst backend, WPF SKGLElement, and Metal Snapshot colour fix.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 of 3.0.0 introduced the Skottie animation builder, SKImage.ToRawShader, and MSVC build support.
preview_summaries.v3.0.0-preview.1.8: Preview 1 of 3.0.0 established the v3 foundation: WinUI and WPF views, Blazor DPI, HarfBuzz 8.3.0, and removal of all v2 obsoletes.

harfbuzz_summary: Ships HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0 with the v3 stable foundation including LibraryImport P/Invoke, .NET 8 support, and new WebAssembly platform coverage.
